Renowned for her innovative approach in decision sciences, Saniya Prosper is the architect behind the Coral Bridge Algorithm. Influential in her journey was her doctoral advisor, Radmila Djuric, who provided essential mentorship throughout her studies. As a valued member of Lantern Bearers Hall, Saniya collaborates with fellow enthusiasts in her specialization. She has had the privilege of receiving primary funding from Glacier Frontier Corp, which has enabled her to pursue several important research endeavors.
